name: incremental-reading-obsidian
description: Leverage spaced repetition to incrementally build understanding and retain knowledge.

scripts.build: pnpm run check && node esbuild.config.mjs production
scripts.e2e:setup: pnpm run build && pnpm exec playwright test --project e2e-setup
scripts.e2e: pnpm run build && cross-env E2E_CLEANUP=1 pnpm exec playwright test --project e2e
scripts.e2e:ui: pnpm run build && cross-env E2E_CLEANUP=1 pnpm exec playwright test --ui --project e2e
scripts.e2e:keep-vaults: pnpm run build && cross-env E2E_CLEANUP=0 pnpm exec playwright test --project e2e
scripts.e2e:codegen: pnpm exec concurrently -k --timings "pnpm run dev" "pnpm exec wait-on main.js && pnpm exec tsx e2e-tests/setup/codegen.ts"
scripts.e2e:repeat: pnpm run build && cross-env E2E_CLEANUP=1 pnpm exec playwright test --project e2e --repeat-each 10
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json

author: Gautam Panakkal <gautampanakkal@gmail.com>
